scripts.build: npm run build -w @qkitt/queue && npm run build -w @qkitt/queue-config
scripts.test: npm run test -w @qkitt/queue && npm run build -w @qkitt/queue && npm run test -w @qkitt/queue-config
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @qkitt/queue && npm run build -w @qkitt/queue && npm run typecheck -w @qkitt/queue-config
scripts.bench: npm run build:queue && npm run bench -w @qkitt/queue-bench
scripts.bench:fifo: npm run build:queue && npm run bench:fifo -w @qkitt/queue-bench
scripts.bench:worker: npm run build:queue && npm run bench:worker -w @qkitt/queue-bench
scripts.pack:check: npm run pack:check -w @qkitt/queue && npm run pack:check -w @qkitt/queue-config
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run pack:check
scripts.examples: tsx examples/worker-drain/main.ts && tsx examples/retry-pipeline/main.ts && tsx examples/persist-restart/main.ts && tsx examples/router-topics/main.ts && tsx examples/with-config/main.ts
